bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=energy-analyst Items: 2 · Forecasts emitted: 20 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-13 · [research_task] Analyze transmission of Strait of Hormuz risk to yields

DONE · owner=energy-analyst · research discussion=Analyze transmission of Strait of Hormuz risk to yields (led by energy-analyst)

Determine how a potential surge in Crude Oil prices above 00 impacts the MOVE index and 10Y yields. (Ref: Section 4 Follow-ups)

  • Outcome: research discussion "Analyze transmission of Strait of Hormuz risk to yields" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 本报告片作为系列研究的最终质控（QA），对前序从原油地缘供给冲击、全球央行政策反应、大类资产防衰退范式转移，到A股防守风格切换、大金融分红刚性及中小银行资产承压导致城投非标违约信用链传导的9张研究记录进行了全面逻辑审查与数据一致性审计。本系列研究推演完美自洽，数据翔实，引注合规，整体评为PASS（通过）。 | → 20 forecast(s) on MRO,MOVE,CSRC,MSCI,BV, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 20 (0 positions); tickers: MRO, MOVE, CSRC, MSCI, BV, STEO
